How it Works

Streamlining B2B collaborations for buyers and providers.

For Buyers

Post a Request

Describe your project requirements, timeline, and budget in minutes.

Compare Quotes

Receive competitive bids from verified providers and review their portfolios.

Secure Hire

Finalize contracts through our secure platform with milestone protection.

For Providers

Search Projects

Filter through high-quality leads that match your team's expertise.

Submit Quote

Present your value proposition and win projects with tailored proposals.

Start Earning

Get paid on time with our automated billing and payment escort service.

CEO · Alphabet & Google

“SME Connect is now our default way to source specialist partners across regions.”

Elon Musk

CEO · Tesla, SpaceX & xAI

“The verified pool of providers lets our team move from idea to launch much faster.”

Jensen Huang

Founder & CEO · NVIDIA

“We can spin up expert squads for niche projects without slowing our roadmap.”

Mark Zuckerberg

Founder & CEO · Meta

“Having trusted agencies on tap has simplified how we experiment and iterate.”

"SME Connect transformed how we source external legal and accounting support. The verification process gives us peace of mind that we're hiring top-tier talent."

CEO, TechFlow Systems
